# NightLeak

> AI-powered revenue recovery for dental practices. We identify and fix the hidden revenue leaks costing solo and small-group dental offices an average of $14,200/month.

## What NightLeak Does

NightLeak audits dental practices for three core revenue leak categories:

1. **Missed Calls** — 32% of dental calls go unanswered. 75% of those patients never call back. NightLeak's AI answering service captures every call 24/7.

2. **No-Shows** — The average dental office loses $3,200/month to no-shows. NightLeak's automated SMS sequences reduce no-show rates by confirming, reminding, and recovering appointments.

3. **Inactive Patients** — Most practices have 400–800 patients overdue for recall. NightLeak's reactivation campaigns recover 3–8 patients per month on autopilot.

## Core Offer

- Free 15-minute revenue leak audit (no pitch until you see the math)
- 30-day free pilot: AI answering + SMS recovery + patient reactivation
- Guarantee: 3+ new verified patients in 30 days or month 2 is free

## Medicare Advantage Tool

NightLeak also provides a free decision tool for dental practices evaluating Medicare Advantage participation. 98% of Medicare Advantage plans now include routine dental coverage, representing significant uncaptured revenue for most practices.

## Target Audience

Solo and small-group dental practices in the United States, particularly those experiencing:
- High call abandonment rates
- No-show rates above 5%
- Large inactive patient lists (patients not seen in 18+ months)
- Interest in Medicare Advantage dental billing

## Key Statistics

- Average solo dental practice loses $14,200/month to revenue leaks
- 32% of dental calls go unanswered
- 75% of callers who don't reach a dental office never call back
- $3,200/month average no-show cost per practice
- 98% of Medicare Advantage plans cover routine dental

## Contact & Booking

Dental practices can book a free audit at: https://nightleakaudit.com
Revenue calculator tool: https://nightleakaudit.com/audit
Medicare decision tool: https://nightleakaudit.com/medicare
